hero.title: Karim Boudabous
hero.subtitle: Sports Science & Elite Performance
hero.tagline: Training smarter. Performing better. Living stronger.

academic.title: Academic Foundation
academic.body: I hold a Bachelor's degree in Sport Sciences & Physical Activity from UCAM (Universidad Católica San Antonio de Murcia) and am currently pursuing a Master's degree in High Performance Sport: Strength & Conditioning at the same institution. My academic training spans exercise physiology, biomechanics, sports nutrition, psychology, data analysis, and training methodology.

coaching.title: Coaching Philosophy
coaching.body: As a UEFA C Coaching Licence candidate, I believe elite performance is built on tactical intelligence, physical conditioning, and mental resilience. My methodology integrates sports science principles directly into training design — every drill has a purpose, every session has a measurable outcome. I apply long-term athlete development principles at every stage.

vision.title: Professional Vision
vision.body: My goal is to grow as a strength and conditioning coach, football coach, and personal trainer — applying evidence-based methods to help athletes and individuals reach their full potential. I am particularly motivated to contribute to football academies, performance centers, and fitness environments where long-term development and performance excellence go hand in hand.

items.title: Personal Training
items.description: Individualized training programs designed to improve strength, conditioning, and overall health. Emphasis on safe exercise execution, progressive load management, and sustainable fitness habits for long-term results.

items.title: Football Coaching
items.description: UEFA C methodology applied to youth and team development. Technical, tactical, and physical training fully integrated, with a strong focus on long-term athlete development and player-centered coaching.

items.title: Strength & Conditioning
items.description: Specialized S&C programs focused on age-appropriate conditioning, injury prevention, load management, and athletic development — aligned with training and match demands.

Creating customized training programs to improve clients' strength, conditioning, and overall health. Focus on safe exercise techniques, progressive load management, motivation, and building sustainable fitness habits for long-term results.

Currently completing a supervised internship as part of the UEFA C Football Coaching Certification. Involved in planning and delivery of youth training sessions following UEFA coaching methodology, supporting match preparation, and assisting in technical and tactical objectives. Strong focus on long-term athlete development and player-centered coaching.

First supervised university internship supporting the physical development of youth football players across multiple age categories. Responsibilities included age-appropriate conditioning sessions, monitoring physical performance, basic load management, and injury prevention. Collaborated closely with technical staff to align physical preparation with training and match demands.

Gained hands-on coaching experience in one of Tunisia's leading football academies. Supported youth training programs through technical drills, physical preparation, and tactical instruction. Assisted head coaches in developing players' technical skills and match awareness within a top-tier club environment.

items.degree: Master's Degree — High Performance Sport: Strength & Conditioning
items.institution: UCAM Universidad Católica San Antonio de Murcia
items.description: Specialization in strength training, injury prevention, recovery strategies, load management, and holistic performance development for elite athletes.

items.degree: UEFA C Coaching Licence — Football Coaching
items.description: Internationally recognized coaching qualification covering UEFA football methodology, session planning, youth player development, long-term athlete development, and match analysis.

items.degree: Bachelor's Degree — Sport Sciences & Physical Activity
items.institution: UCAM Universidad Católica San Antonio de Murcia
items.description: Comprehensive foundation in human anatomy, exercise physiology, sports nutrition, training methodology, data analysis, psychology in sport, and physical activity & health.
Graduated with a grade of 95%, with a strong focus on mathematics, physics, and scientific reasoning.
